title: Public Health Outcomes Framework: November 2025 data update
body: " The Office for Health Improvement and Disparities (OHID) has published the Public Health Outcomes Framework (PHOF) data update for November 2025.   The data is presented in an interactive tool that allows users to view it in a user friendly format. The data tool also provides links to further supporting information, to aid understanding of public health in a local population.   This update includes new data for 49 indicators, including indicators on:   mortality overweight, including obesity, prevalence in children childhood immunisation early cancer diagnosis loneliness smoking prevalence violent crime child development   Further details of all indicators in the PHOF, including date of last update, geographies included and inequality breakdowns, are available from PHOF indicator details.  "
